name: curl
description: Transfer data from or to a server

name: -X
--request
options.description: HTTP method to use (GET, POST, etc.)

name: -u
--user
options.description: Set user and password for auth

name: -b
--cookie
options.description: Send cookies from string or file

name: -c
--cookie-jar
options.description: Save cookies to file after transfer

name: --url
options.description: Set the URL to work with

name: --connect-timeout
options.description: Set max connect time in seconds

name: -m
--max-time
options.description: Set max total time in seconds
